sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Bank OZK posts $171.9 million fourth-quarter profit
feed.summary: Bank OZK reported a fourth-quarter profit of $171.9 million, a decrease from $178.1 million in the previous year, with earnings per share of $1.53, falling short of analyst expectations. Despite this quarterly dip, the bank achieved record annual net interest income of $1.59 billion and a new annual EPS record of $6.18, driven by significant growth in loans and deposits. The company, operating 265 offices across nine states, had $40.8 billion in total assets as of December 31, 2025.

feed.title: Sprott Physical Silver Trust Updates Its "At-the-Market" Equity Program
feed.summary: Sprott Physical Silver Trust has updated its "at-the-market" equity program to issue up to U.S.$2.0 billion of units in the United States and Canada. This program allows for the sale of units through agents on the NYSE Arca and Toronto Stock Exchange at prevailing market prices. The Trust intends to use the proceeds from this program to acquire physical silver bullion, in line with its investment objectives.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Encourages Globe Life Inc. (GL) Stockholders to Inquire about Securities Investigation
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC is investigating potential claims on behalf of purchasers of Globe Life Inc. (NYSE:GL) securities who bought before May 8, 2019, and still hold them. The investigation focuses on whether Globe Life and its officers engaged in corporate wrongdoing. The firm encourages affected investors to visit their website for more information or to assist with the investigation, with no cost to the investors.

feed.title: Related Ross Lands Wells Fargo HQ At West Palm Beach Office Tower
feed.summary: Related Ross announced that Wells Fargo & Co. has signed a 50,000 square foot lease at their One Flagler office building in West Palm Beach to establish a new headquarters for its wealth-management business. This lease brings the One Flagler building to 100% occupancy and is part of Wells Fargo's expansion plans, including hiring more employees in the region. Related Ross aims to develop West Palm Beach into a financial hub and a "Wall Street of the South," and is also targeting technology and defense tech companies for further growth.

feed.title: Kroger breaks ground on $38M store in Crawfordsville
feed.summary: Kroger has broken ground on a new $38 million, 100,000-square-foot store in Crawfordsville, Indiana. The new store, located on a 20-acre site, will replace an older, smaller Kroger facility and is expected to open in late 2026, creating approximately 200 jobs. This investment is part of Kroger's ongoing commitment to the Indiana market, aiming to provide an enhanced shopping experience and a wider range of products.

feed.title: ACHR-WT Archer Aviation WT (NYSE) after hours -512% 20 Jan 2026: Watch liquidity
feed.summary: Archer Aviation WT (ACHR-WT) stock experienced a drastic after-hours plunge of over 500% to -6.52 USD on high volume, which the article attributes to potential warrant trading dynamics, order imbalances, or data feed distortions rather than new operational news. Meyka AI rates ACHR-WT a B (HOLD) with mixed technicals, decent cash per share, and projects short-term price targets, advising caution and verification for traders due to unusual pricing behavior.

feed.title: DuPont Appoints D.G. Macpherson to Board of Directors
feed.summary: DuPont has announced the appointment of D.G. Macpherson, CEO of W.W. Grainger, to its board of directors as an independent director, effective January 20, 2026. Macpherson's extensive experience in operational excellence and supply chain optimization is expected to enhance DuPont's growth strategy. While analysts have issued a Buy rating for DD stock, TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates it as Neutral, citing strong earnings and technicals offset by financial and valuation concerns.

feed.title: Mettler Toledo announces Michael J. Tokich to join board of directors
feed.summary: Mettler-Toledo International, Inc. has announced that Michael J. Tokich will be joining its board of directors. The announcement was made on January 20, 2026, at 5:38 PM EST. This news comes amidst other recent updates for the company, including analyst price target adjustments and presentation dates at healthcare conferences.

feed.title: Realty Income and Alpine Income: Stable Returns and Growth Potential
feed.summary: This article analyzes Realty Income (O) and Alpine Income (PINE) as potential investments. Realty Income is highlighted for its stable business model focusing on consumer staples and its attractive 5.26% dividend yield. Alpine Income, though smaller, offers a higher 6.5% dividend yield and significant growth potential through strategic acquisitions of single-tenant commercial properties.

feed.title: Bank OZK (OZK) Q4 Earnings Miss Estimates Amid Rising Credit Los
feed.summary: Bank OZK reported Q4 earnings per share of $1.53, missing the consensus estimate of $1.58, primarily due to increased credit loss provisions totaling $50.6 million. Despite the earnings miss, the bank's net interest income exceeded forecasts at $407.0 million, and real estate loan originations reached a two-year high of $1.61 billion. Bank OZK maintains a strong financial position with robust profitability, a stable balance sheet, and a diversified geographical footprint.

feed.title: Extra Space Storage Inc. Announces Date of Earnings Release and
feed.summary: Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE: EXR) will release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025, on Thursday, February 19, 2026, after market close. The company will host a conference call on Friday, February 20, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. ET, led by CEO Joe Margolis and CFO Jeff Norman, to discuss the results and recent events. A live webcast and replay of the call, along with the full earnings report, will be available on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Fastenal signals double-digit net sales growth in 2026 with expanding digital footprint
feed.summary: The article discusses Fastenal's projected double-digit net sales growth for 2026, driven in part by its expanding digital presence.

feed.title: Ethiopian government meets with Starbucks
feed.summary: The Ethiopian government and Starbucks have held discussions focused on expanding Ethiopia's coffee presence in global markets. The meeting, involving Minister of Agriculture Addisu Arega Kitessa and Starbucks Vice President Roberto Vega Alonso, aimed to secure a reliable supply of specialty coffee and increase its share in Starbucks products. Starbucks also reaffirmed its commitment to supporting Ethiopian smallholder coffee farmers, complementing reports of a 400% increase in Starbucks' coffee purchases following previous cooperation agreements.

feed.title: American Express declares quarterly dividend on Series D preferred shares
feed.summary: American Express has declared a quarterly dividend of $8,875.00 per share on its 3.550% Fixed Rate Reset Noncumulative Preferred Shares, Series D, payable on March 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 1, 2026. This announcement follows a consistent 56-year dividend payment record for the financial services giant. The company also recently announced a common share dividend and updated delinquency data, while receiving revised analyst ratings.

feed.title: California American Water's Aquifer Storage and Recovery Adds to Community's Water Supply
feed.summary: California American Water is continuing its Aquifer Storage and Recovery (ASR) program to capture and store excess winter flows from the Carmel River into underground aquifers for use during droughts. The ASR program, which has been successful for over two decades, has captured over 240-acre feet of water since December 26, 2025, and 715-acre feet in the previous water year. This initiative, combined with water recycling and a desalination project, aims to build reliable and resilient water infrastructure for the community amidst increasing drought concerns.

feed.title: Safe & Green Holdings rebrands to Olenox Industries, changes ticker
feed.summary: Safe & Green Holdings Corp. has rebranded as Olenox Industries Inc. and will now trade under the NASDAQ ticker OLOX, replacing SGBX. The name change reflects its focus as a developer, designer, and fabricator of modular structures. The company, founded in 2007, recently acquired Giant Containers Inc. and is expanding its modular enclosure systems production, despite facing financial challenges with a weak gross profit margin and current ratio.

feed.title: Safe & Green Holdings appoints RBSM LLP as new independent auditor
feed.summary: Safe & Green Holdings Corp. announced the appointment of RBSM LLP as its new independent registered public accounting firm to audit its financial statements for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The company confirmed no prior consultations or disagreements with RBSM LLP regarding accounting principles. This announcement follows Safe & Green Holdings' rebranding to Olenox Industries Inc., focusing on modular structures, with its subsidiary Giant Containers beginning manufacturing operations in Texas.

feed.title: Sg Blocks Rebrands as Olenox Industries with New Ticker
feed.summary: Safe & Green Holdings Corp. has rebranded as Olenox Industries Inc., and its Nasdaq ticker symbol changed from SGBX to OLOX, effective January 22, 2026. This rebranding aims to better reflect the company's focus on modular, engineered solutions across industrial, energy, and infrastructure markets. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates SGBX (now OLOX) as "Underperform" due to significant financial weaknesses, despite some corporate actions providing limited support.

feed.title: Wells Fargo is moving its wealth-management office to West Palm Beach
feed.summary: Wells Fargo is relocating the headquarters of its wealth-management operations to downtown West Palm Beach, moving over 50 senior executives. The company will lease 50,000 square feet in the One Flagler office tower, starting in August. This move is seen as a strategic decision to strengthen local leadership and engage with clients in a high-opportunity market, reinforcing West Palm Beach's growing status as a financial hub.

feed.title: Intuit (NASDAQ:INTU) Reaches New 1-Year Low - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Intuit (NASDAQ:INTU) recently hit a new 52-week low of $530.53, despite beating quarterly earnings expectations with $3.34 EPS and $3.87 billion in revenue. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $794.62, though company insiders have sold approximately $255.5 million worth of stock in the last 90 days. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $1.20, with a payout ratio of 32.81%.

feed.title: Avalon GloboCare Advances KetoAir Digital Health Launch Strategy
feed.summary: Avalon GloboCare announced the renewal of FDA establishment registration for its KetoAir™ ketogenic breathalyzer device. The company plans to launch KetoAir™ in Q2 2026 using its AI video SaaS platform to drive both B2B and B2C adoption, aiming for scalable and cost-efficient market penetration in digital health. Avalon GloboCare is a diversified company focusing on precision diagnostic consumer products, cellular therapy, generative AI publishing, and real estate, with KetoAir™ being a key product.

feed.title: Form 424B2 GOLDMAN SACHS GROUP INC
feed.summary: This Form 424B2 filing from Goldman Sachs Group Inc. details an offering of Autocallable Buffered Basket-Linked Notes due January 27, 2028, guaranteed by The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. The notes' payout is based on the performance of an equally weighted basket of six common stocks, maturing unless automatically called on February 5, 2027. The document outlines the terms, potential payouts including a buffered downside, anti-dilution adjustments, and significant risk factors, emphasizing that investors could lose their entire investment.

feed.title: United: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: United Airlines Holdings Inc. (UAL) reported strong fourth-quarter earnings, beating Wall Street expectations with a profit of $1.04 billion and adjusted earnings of $3.10 per share. The airline's revenue also surpassed forecasts, reaching $15.4 billion for the period. These results were generated by Automated Insights using data from Zacks Investment Research.

feed.title: Hasbro adds former Nintendo president, Honest Co. CEO to board
feed.summary: Hasbro has appointed Doug Bowser, former president and COO of Nintendo of America Inc., and Carla Vernón, CEO of The Honest Co., to its board of directors. These additions bring significant experience from major consumer brands as Hasbro prepares for its upcoming move from Pawtucket, R.I., to Boston. This strategic move aims to strengthen the company's leadership with diverse industry expertise.

feed.title: Signing Day Sports Addresses Unusual NYSE American Trading Activity
feed.summary: Signing Day Sports, Inc. (SGN) announced it is aware of unusual trading activity in its common stock on the NYSE American but cited no new material business developments or known company-specific reasons for the market volatility. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates SGN as Neutral due to weak financial fundamentals, despite recent funding and merger developments. SGN operates a mobile app for student-athlete recruitment, helping them connect with college coaches.

feed.title: Amcor to report fiscal 2026 second quarter and half year results
feed.summary: Amcor plc (NYSE: AMCR; ASX: AMC) will announce its fiscal 2026 second quarter and half year results for the period ending December 31, 2025, after the US market closes on Tuesday, February 3, 2026. A conference call and webcast will be held to discuss these results, with dial-in information provided for various regions. Access to the webcast and supporting materials will be available on Amcor's investor relations website.

feed.title: Edison International (EIX) Downgraded by Wells Fargo Amid Fire Liability Concerns
feed.summary: Edison International (EIX) experienced a 3.9% stock price decline following a downgrade by Wells Fargo from Equal Weight to Underweight, with a new price target of $59. This downgrade is primarily due to uncertainties surrounding potential liabilities from the Eaton Fire and regulatory challenges in California. The company's financial health shows strong operating margins but is tempered by significant debt levels, and recent insider selling further contributes to a mixed outlook.

feed.title: Amcor to Announce Fiscal 2026 Q2, Half-Year Results
feed.summary: Amcor plc (NYSE: AMCR; ASX: AMC) will announce its fiscal 2026 second quarter and half-year results after the US market closes on Tuesday, February 3, 2026. A conference call and webcast to discuss the results will be held at 5:30 PM US Eastern Standard Time on the same day. Details for participating in the call and accessing supporting materials are available on Amcor's investor website.

feed.title: Dominion Energy gives reasoning for high electric bills in Virginia
feed.summary: Dominion Energy explains that higher electricity bills in Virginia are due to December 2025 being the coldest December since 2010, leading to increased HVAC usage. The company spokesperson, Craig Carper, clarifies that while bills may seem "sky-high," they could be considered normal given the extreme cold. Dominion Energy offers various resources, including an Energy Saving tool, budget billing, and energy alerts, to help customers manage their usage and payments, as well as the "Energy Share" program for those needing financial assistance.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley buys $110M Fremont industrial site as AI demand drives investor interest
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has acquired a nearly 300,000-square-foot industrial site in Fremont for $110 million, driven by increasing investor interest in properties suitable for advanced manufacturing and AI capabilities. The site is currently leased to a long-term tenant, Western Digital, and possesses features essential for artificial intelligence and machine learning operations. This purchase highlights the growing demand for specialized industrial spaces in Silicon Valley.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz Stock Slips As Berkshire Hathaway Signals Plans To Sell
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz (NASDAQ: KHC) shares slipped in after-hours trading following Berkshire Hathaway's filing to sell up to 325 million shares of the company, representing a significant portion of its 27.5% stake. This move comes after Warren Buffett's retirement as Berkshire Hathaway's CEO at the end of 2025. Kraft Heinz is expected to report its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on February 11.

feed.title: Merck/Moderna Intismeran Data Show Continued Efficacy In Melanoma
feed.summary: New data from Merck and Moderna's Intismeran (mRNA-4157) melanoma vaccine show continued efficacy. The updated results highlight the ongoing positive impact of the treatment in preventing recurrence and death in patients with high-risk melanoma. This marks a significant milestone in the development of mRNA-based cancer therapies.

feed.title: American Express declares quarterly dividend on Series D preferred shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: American Express (NYSE: AXP) has announced a quarterly dividend of $8,875.00 per share on its 3.550% Fixed Rate Reset Noncumulative Preferred Shares, Series D. This dividend, equivalent to $8.87500 per Depositary Share, will be paid on March 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 1, 2026. The financial services company boasts a 56-year record of continuous dividend payments and also declared a common share dividend of $0.82 payable on February 10, 2026.

feed.title: Integrated Quantum Technologies Taps Former Equifax AI Leader to Drive Secure, Quantum-Ready Platform Growth
feed.summary: Integrated Quantum Technologies has appointed Jeremy Samuelson, a former Principal Data and AI Scientist at Equifax, as Executive Vice President of Artificial Intelligence and Innovation. Samuelson will lead the company's AI strategy, focusing on developing and commercializing its AIQu platform and VEIL privacy-preserving technology to help regulated enterprises securely adopt AI and prepare for quantum-related challenges. Integrated Cyber Solutions Inc., operating as Integrated Quantum Technologies, develops quantum-ready AI infrastructure and currently has a Hold rating from analysts with a C$2.00 price target.

feed.title: Bank OZK: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Bank OZK (OZK) reported fourth-quarter earnings of $176 million, or $1.53 per share, which fell short of Wall Street estimates of $1.56 per share. However, the bank's revenue net of interest expense was $440.7 million, exceeding analyst forecasts of $432.6 million. For the full year, Bank OZK posted a profit of $715.5 million on revenue of $1.73 billion.

feed.title: MAA Announces Taxable Composition of 2025 Distributions
feed.summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (MAA) has announced the taxable composition of its 2025 distributions to shareholders, indicating no portion is expected to be a return of capital and no foreign taxes were incurred. The release details the distribution classifications for both common stock and preferred stock, which are largely comprised of ordinary taxable distribution with a small percentage as long-term capital gain. This information is preliminary and provided to assist with 1099 form distribution.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz files prospectus supplement for possible resale of 325 million shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: The Kraft Heinz Company has filed a prospectus supplement for the potential resale of up to 325 million shares of its common stock by Berkshire Hathaway Inc. This filing does not imply an immediate sale by Berkshire Hathaway, and Kraft Heinz will not receive any proceeds from such sales. The company, which offers a 6.8% dividend yield, is navigating competitive pressures and preparing for a planned separation into two independent entities in 2026.

feed.title: NOG Schedules Fourth Quarter and Year-End 2025 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Northern Oil and Gas, Inc. (NOG) announced its plans to release its fourth quarter and year-end 2025 financial and operating results on Wednesday, February 25, 2026, after market close. The company will host a conference call on Thursday, February 26, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Central Time to discuss these results, with dial-in and webcast details provided. A replay of the call will be available until March 12, 2026, and an archive on NOG's website until February 25, 2027.

feed.title: GRABAR LAW OFFICE INVESTIGATES CLAIMS ON BEHALF OF LONG-TERM SHAREHOLDERS OF MOLINA HEALTHCARE, INC. (MOH)
feed.summary: Grabar Law Office is investigating Molina Healthcare, Inc. (MOH) on behalf of long-term shareholders who purchased shares before February 5, 2025. The investigation stems from allegations that certain officers and directors breached fiduciary duties by failing to disclose material adverse facts regarding "medical cost trend assumptions" and a "dislocation between premium rates and medical cost trend." Shareholders are encouraged to contact Grabar Law Office to seek corporate reforms and the return of funds to the company.

feed.title: American Express (AXP) declares preferred stock dividend
feed.summary: American Express (AXP) has declared a quarterly dividend of $8,875.00 per share on its 3.550% Fixed Rate Reset Noncumulative Preferred Shares, Series D. This dividend is equivalent to $8.87500 per related Depositary Share. The payment is scheduled for March 15, 2026, to shareholders on record as of March 1, 2026.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz Registers Potential Berkshire Hathaway Share Resale
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz has filed a resale prospectus supplement with the SEC to register the potential resale of over 325 million existing shares by its major shareholder, Berkshire Hathaway Inc. This administrative step allows for shareholder-driven transactions without Kraft Heinz issuing new shares or receiving proceeds. An analyst has rated KHC stock as a Hold with a $23 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, maintains a Neutral stance due to financial and operational challenges, despite a high dividend yield.

feed.title: Duke Energy eyes Piedmont Triad for potential nuclear development
feed.summary: Duke Energy has submitted an early site permit application to the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission for a potential new nuclear development near the Belews Creek Steam Station in Stokes County, North Carolina. While no final decision has been made, the move allows the company to evaluate the suitability of the site for small modular reactors (SMRs) to meet future energy demands. If approved and pursued, Duke Energy aims to add 600 megawatts of nuclear power to its system by 2037, with the first SMR becoming operational in 2036.

feed.title: CDW Corp. stock underperforms Tuesday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: CDW Corp. (CDW) stock fell on Tuesday, underperforming its competitors. The stock closed at $233.51, representing a 0.32% decrease, while the S&P 500 rose by 0.29%.

feed.title: American Express Declares Dividend on Series D Preferred Stock
feed.summary: American Express Company declared a quarterly dividend of $8,875.00 per share on its 3.550% Fixed Rate Reset Noncumulative Preferred Shares, Series D. This dividend is equivalent to $8.87500 per related Depositary Share and is payable on March 15, 2026, to shareholders of record on March 1, 2026. The company, a global payments and premium lifestyle brand, also provides contact information for media, investors, and analysts.

feed.title: Denver oil and gas company sued by shareholders pending merger
feed.summary: Shareholders are suing to block the $12.8 billion merger between Civitas Resources Inc. and SM Energy, as reported by the Denver Business Journal. Although Civitas denied the allegations, the company did disclose new facts in a U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission filing. The suit concerns the pending merger of the Denver-based oil and gas companies.

feed.title: Blackstone Inc. stock falls Tuesday, underperforms market
feed.summary: The article reports that Blackstone Inc. stock fell on Tuesday, performing worse than the broader market. This indicates a negative daily performance for the investment company's shares.

feed.title: Moody’s downgrades Sinclair Television to Caa1 on cord-cutting pressure
feed.summary: Moody's Ratings downgraded Sinclair Television Group's corporate family rating to Caa1 from B3, maintaining a stable outlook. This downgrade is attributed to sustained pressure from cord-cutting and weakness in linear TV advertising revenue, despite the company's efforts towards debt reduction. Although political ad revenue in 2026 and a new securitization facility are expected to aid, Moody's anticipates leverage to remain high, between 6x-7x, reflecting structural challenges in the business.

feed.title: SmartFinancial Announces Results for the Fourth Quarter 2025
feed.summary: SmartFinancial, Inc. announced strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025, with net income of $13.7 million ($0.81 per diluted common share) for Q4 2025. The company reported significant organic loan and deposit growth, expanded net interest margin, and an increase in tangible book value per common share. Management highlighted 2025 as a year of "tremendous momentum" and "exceptional growth, profitability, and continued improvement."

feed.title: KKR's Americas buyout fund on track to beat $20B target - report (KKR:NYSE)
feed.summary: KKR's Americas private equity fund is reportedly on track to surpass its $20 billion target, potentially reaching its $22 billion hard cap. This achievement would set a new record for the alternative asset manager's Americas private equity strategy.

feed.title: California American Water's Aquifer Storage and Recovery Adds to Community's Water Supply
feed.summary: California American Water is continuing its Aquifer Storage and Recovery (ASR) program during the rainy season to capture and store excess water from the Carmel River for use during droughts. Since December 26, 2025, the program has captured over 240-acre feet of water, and for water year 2024-2025, over 715-acre feet were stored. This initiative, combined with water recycling and a desalination project, aims to build resilient water infrastructure for the community amidst increasing drought periods.
